positive: A minimalist, modern emblem design featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation of abstract, vibrant geometric stars and delicate cosmic dust trails. The main subject is centrally composed against a deep indigo gradient background. Use a limited color palette of matte gold, ethereal teal, and deep midnight blue. The style should be elegant, celestial, and highly contrasted, designed as a clean silhouette suitable for engraving or screen printing on apparel. Crisp lines, perfect vector geometry, tattoo flash style, symmetrical composition, cinematic studio lighting, high contrast, intricate detail.
negative: blurry, deformed, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, grainy, noise, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy
